title: Alaska SBDC Closed September 2
summary: The Alaska SBDC will be closed on Monday, September 2nd , to celebrate the Labor Day holiday in alignment with the University of Alaska Anchorage (UAA) observance. Regular business hours will resume on Tuesday, September 3rd. In the meantime: Register to become a new client Access our suite of works...

title: Be Ready, Alaska! National Preparedness Month & Business Continuity Planning
summary: September is National Preparedness Month, and here in Alaska, we know the importance of being ready for anything. Our unique climate and remote locations make disaster planning even more critical. This year, the Alaska SBDC wants to empower small businesses to weather storms and thrive through disruptions with Resiliency and Conti...
